summary: Completed comprehensive testing of multi-tenant (church) support and video room features. All 16 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login returns church_id and church_name in user object
GET /api/auth/me returns church_id and church_name
GET /api/churches/lookup?invite_code=XXX returns church info (public endpoint)
GET /api/churches/lookup with invalid code returns 404
GET /api/churches/my returns church details with member_count
PUT /api/churches/{id} updates church name successfully
POST /api/churches/{id}/regenerate-code generates new invite code
GET /api/courses returns courses scoped to user's church_id
GET /api/users returns users scoped to user's church_id
GET /api/analytics returns analytics scoped to church
GET /api/search?q=test returns results scoped to church
POST /api/lessons/{id}/video/join returns valid room_url and meeting_token (token 300+ chars from REST API)
POST /api/auth/register with church_name creates new church + user as admin (auto-approved)
POST /api/auth/register with invite_code joins existing church as member
POST /api/auth/register with invalid invite_code returns 400
API root endpoint returns correct response
Frontend: favicon.ico exists and is served
Frontend: logo192.png exists and is served
Frontend: logo512.png exists and is served
Frontend: manifest.json references logo192.png and logo512.png
Frontend: Registration page shows 4-step flow (Name → Church → Email → Password)
Frontend: Registration step 2 shows 'Create New' and 'Join Existing' church options
Frontend: Registration shows invite code input when 'Join Existing' selected
Frontend: Registration shows church name input when 'Create New' selected
Frontend: Admin page has 4 tabs (Pending, Users, Church, Stats)
Frontend: Church tab shows church name edit input
Frontend: Church tab shows member count
Frontend: Church tab shows invite code with copy button
Frontend: Church tab shows regenerate code button
Frontend: Header shows 'The Room' title with church name subtitle

test_credentials.note: Invite code changes on each regenerate test - use GET /api/churches/my to get current code

seed_data_creation: Test users created during registration tests (test_church_creator_*, test_joiner_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tenant support fully working. Key features: 1) Login/auth/me return church_id and church_name, 2) Registration supports creating new church (user becomes admin, auto-approved) or joining via invite code (user becomes member, needs approval), 3) Church management in admin panel (name edit, member count, invite code copy/regenerate), 4) All queries (courses, users, analytics, search) are scoped to church_id, 5) Video token generation uses Daily.co REST API (tokens are 300+ chars), 6) PWA icons (favicon, logo192, logo512) all exist and manifest.json references them correctly.

multi_tenant_support.church_creation_on_register: Working - creates church, user becomes admin, auto-approved
multi_tenant_support.church_join_via_invite_code: Working - user joins as member, needs approval
multi_tenant_support.church_management_admin_panel: Working - name edit, member count, invite code copy/regenerate
multi_tenant_support.scoped_queries: Working - courses, users, analytics, search all scoped to church_id

video_room.token_generation: Working - uses Daily.co REST API POST /v1/meeting-tokens
video_room.token_length: 300+ characters (confirms REST API, not manual JWT)
